news.title: China’s Z.ai claims it can match Mythos on cybersecurity
news.summary: China's Zhipu AI (Z.ai) released its open-weight GLM-5.2, and some researchers have claimed that it matches Mythos in certain bug-finding and cybersecurity scenarios. news.summary: Suno has ambitions to be more than just a toy to churn out AI slop, it also wants to be a streaming destination and to break new artists. news.title: China claims the world’s fastest supercomputer
news.summary: Despite trade restrictions, China has reclaimed the title of the world's fastest supercomputer for the first time since 2018. news.summary: Drone shows are the new fireworks—and possibly a new kind of religion. I traveled to Texas to be converted.

news.title: Top Google Security Staff Warn Search Data Could Be Hacked if EU Rules Change
news.summary: Europe’s pro-competition proposals could see Google Search and Android systems opened up. The company claims there are serious privacy flaws.

news.title: Truckloads of Tesla Batteries Keep Getting Stolen Before They Even Leave the Factory
news.summary: Nine major suspected cargo thefts happened at Tesla’s Nevada battery factory in January alone, according to sheriff’s records obtained by WIRED.
